title: A Dull Eyed Rattlesnake That Lay
content:
A dull eyed rattlesnake that lay
All loathsome, yellow-skinned, and slept,
Coil'd tight as pine-knot, in the sun
With flat head through the center run,
Struck blindly back.
meaning:
Joaquin Miller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Dull Eyed Rattlesnake That Lay"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
